name: io.github.mikusnuz/app-publish
description: Unified MCP server for App Store Connect & Google Play Console — 91 tools for iOS/Android app management, TestFlight, builds, submissions, pricing, and sales reports

environmentVariables.name: APPLE_KEY_ID
environmentVariables.description: Apple App Store Connect API Key ID

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to Google Play service account JSON key file
